debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
B : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) → N ∈ D → Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
hB : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), N = sSup (B N hN)
hB' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), sSupIndep (B N hN)
hB'' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), ⊥ ∉ B N hN
H : ∃ N, ∃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN ≠ {N}
⊢ @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition.refinement C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M D B hB hB' hB'' < D

proof:
by
  apply lt_of_le_of_ne (refinement_le B hB hB' hB'')
  intro h_eq
  rcases H with ⟨N, hN, hne⟩
  have h_sub : B N hN ⊆ D.carrier := by
    intro N' hN'
    have h_carrier_eq : (refinement B hB hB' hB'').carrier = D.carrier := congr_arg carrier h_eq
    exact h_carrier_eq ▸ Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨N, Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨hN, hN'⟩⟩
  have h_all : ∀ N' ∈ B N hN, N' = N := by
    intro N' hN'
    have hN'leN : N' ≤ N := Eq.symm (hB N hN) ▸ le_sSup hN'
    by_contra h_ne
    have hN'mem : N' ∈ D.carrier := h_sub hN'
    have h_disj : Disjoint N' N := by
      have h_disj_sSup := sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup D.sSupIndep' hN'mem (Set.singleton_subset_iff.mpr hN) h_ne
      rwa [sSup_singleton] at h_disj_sSup
    have h_bot : N' = ⊥ := h_disj.eq_bot_of_le hN'leN
    exact hB'' N hN (h_bot ▸ hN')
  apply hne
  ext N'
  constructor
  · exact h_all N'
  · intro hN'eq
    have h_ne_empty : (B N hN).Nonempty := by
      by_contra h_empty
      have h_bot : N = ⊥ := (hB N hN).trans (Set.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.mp h_empty ▸ sSup_empty)
      exact D.not_bot_mem (h_bot ▸ hN)
    rcases h_ne_empty with ⟨N'', hN''⟩
    have hN''eq : N'' = N := h_all N'' hN''
    subst hN'eq
    exact hN''eq ▸ hN''
successful_attempts:
by
  apply lt_of_le_of_ne (refinement_le B hB hB' hB'')
  intro h_eq
  rcases H with ⟨N, hN, hne⟩
  have h_sub : B N hN ⊆ D.carrier := by
    intro N' hN'
    have h_carrier_eq : (refinement B hB hB' hB'').carrier = D.carrier := congr_arg carrier h_eq
    exact h_carrier_eq ▸ Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨N, Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨hN, hN'⟩⟩
  have h_all : ∀ N' ∈ B N hN, N' = N := by
    intro N' hN'
    have hN'leN : N' ≤ N := Eq.symm (hB N hN) ▸ le_sSup hN'
    by_contra h_ne
    have hN'mem : N' ∈ D.carrier := h_sub hN'
    have h_disj : Disjoint N' N := by
      have h_disj_sSup := sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup D.sSupIndep' hN'mem (Set.singleton_subset_iff.mpr hN) h_ne
      rwa [sSup_singleton] at h_disj_sSup
    have h_bot : N' = ⊥ := h_disj.eq_bot_of_le hN'leN
    exact hB'' N hN (h_bot ▸ hN')
  apply hne
  ext N'
  constructor
  · exact h_all N'
  · intro hN'eq
    have h_ne_empty : (B N hN).Nonempty := by
      by_contra h_empty
      have h_bot : N = ⊥ := (hB N hN).trans (Set.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.mp h_empty ▸ sSup_empty)
      exact D.not_bot_mem (h_bot ▸ hN)
    rcases h_ne_empty with ⟨N'', hN''⟩
    have hN''eq : N'' = N := h_all N'' hN''
    subst hN'eq
    exact hN''eq ▸ hN''
